home.headline: This Week's Schedule & Ongoing Events
home.lead: Make sure to check it out on days you can come visit 🤍

schedule.title: This Week's Stream Schedule
schedule.noteHtml: Finally playing Tomodachi Collection and NTE for the first time! I’m especially excited for the character creator in Tomodachi Collection, maybe I’ll even do a whole stream just for that. Planning to make another island for members too~! The cooking stream is participation-based, but I’ll only do it once (it was way too difficult). If you’re planning to buy and play the game yourself, keep that in mind before purchasing!

about.title: About
about.bodyHtml:
Default Outfit　162.5cm
　
School Uniform　160cm
Color design:ミードリ

御手洗 遊

Mitarai Asobu

I can be a bit mischievous and pretty playful...
but let's get along, okay?
🦝SpeciesHalf Human, Half Raccoon
🎂Debut & BirthdayJanuary 3rd
⋈Support Mark⋈🦝 (bow tie & raccoon)
💗Fan NameJumyou (Lifespan)
🌅Good MorningOhami-ta
☀️HelloKonmi-ta
🌙Good Work / See YouOtsumi-ta
💵Naisu-pa / NaimenOffering / Kenjou / Jumyou no Kenjou / Subarashiki Jumyou no Kenjou
🎮ActivitiesChatting, Gaming, Drawing
👞Height157cm (without shoes)
Not Otearai! I'm Mitarai Asobu!
When you're happy, spend time with Asobu
When you're lonely, spend time with Asobu
When you're struggling, spend time with Asobu
Your life plan is decided🖤
Make absolute use of your lifespan🖤
A request 🤍
Please try to avoid using the phrase "Naisu-pa" during my streams!
The reason is that it does not carry the weight of your "lifespan"!

✨ Dreams I Want to Achieve

I'll do my best too, so you do your best too, okay?


🎁 Wish List
Soundproof Room
I've always wanted a Soundproof Room...！
I'd be able to stream at night and record songs and ASMR much more easily 🤍
I'd be so happy if you could support the crowdfunding!
Money
With enough money, I can do anything! I can make my wishes and dreams come true... ehe, ehehe... Hm? O-of course I’d use it for streaming activities too! I actually want to produce lots of MVs~ 🤍
♡ ♡ ♡
Mitarai Asobu
Mitarai Asobu

marshmallow_3000.descHtml: Collecting marshmallows to read at the 3,000 subscriber milestone stream! Send me questions, encouraging messages, plans requests, etc.～

subs_3000_stream.title: 登録者3000人記念配信
subs_3000_stream.descHtml: 新衣装の発表やコメント欄対抗のミニゲームがあるよ！数カ月に一回のお祭り配信だ！今回の目標は同接50人！皆で集まろう～🤍　イベントにあわせて新衣装塗り絵コンテストもチェックしてね！過去のイベント配信も見てみる？

school_uniform_contest.descHtml:
Draw Mitarai Asobu in a school uniform outfit! Deadline: May 31.
Post it with the hashtag #MitaraiAsobuSchoolUniform !
